title: 📰 Charles Schwab Opens Spot BTC and ETH Trading to Retail Clients
message: Schwab rolled out direct spot Bitcoin and Ether trading for retail accounts, with custody in-house and execution routed to Paxos.

title: 📰 UK FCA Drops '24-Hour Trap' in Final Crypto Framework
message: The FCA's final cryptoasset rulebook treats any firm holding client assets for more than 24 hours as a regulated custodian, forcing most UK DEX frontends and fintech wrappers to seek full safeguarding licenses.

title: 📰 Deutsche Börse Takes $200M Stake in Kraken Pre-IPO
message: Germany's largest exchange operator bought 1.5% of Kraken parent Payward at a $13.3B valuation, days before Kraken's confidential SEC IPO filing surfaced.

title: 📰 Ethereum ETFs Hit 4-Day Inflow Streak as Capital Rotates From BTC
message: Spot ETH ETFs pulled in $212M over four straight sessions while Bitcoin funds bled $325M in a single day, flipping the 2026 flow narrative.

title: 📰 Tether Bails Out Drift With $147M, Ousting USDC for USDT
message: Drift Protocol will relaunch with Tether as its settlement layer after securing a $147.5M recovery package, ending Circle's USDC dominance at Solana's biggest perp DEX.

title: 📰 World Network Lift Off Event Goes Live With Major World ID Upgrade
message: World Network is hosting its biggest event since U.S. launch today, unveiling a new World ID protocol version with 18 million verified users.

title: 📰 World Network 'Lift Off' Overhauls World ID Protocol
message: World Network is unveiling its biggest protocol upgrade since its U.S. launch at today's Lift Off event, hosted by Sam Altman and Alex Blania in San Francisco.

title: 📰 CLARITY Act Pulled From Senate Schedule, May Deadline Looms
message: The Senate Banking Committee quietly removed the CLARITY Act from its April 20 agenda, leaving crypto's most important bill on life support with a do-or-die May deadline.

title: 📰 Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF Hits $100M in First Week
message: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF (MSBT) drew over $100 million in inflows during its first week at a 0.14% fee, making it the cheapest BTC product available.

title: 📰 Schwab Goes Live With Direct BTC and ETH Trading
message: Charles Schwab has begun rolling out its Schwab Crypto platform, letting clients buy and sell bitcoin and ethereum directly alongside traditional investments.

title: 📰 World Network 'Lift Off' Unveils Major World ID Overhaul
message: World Network is hosting its biggest event since U.S. launch today, unveiling a new World ID protocol version and partnerships spanning social media, gaming, and governance.

title: 📰 Schwab Goes Live With Spot BTC and ETH Trading
message: Charles Schwab began rolling out direct bitcoin and ethereum trading to brokerage clients, giving $12 trillion in managed assets a crypto on-ramp.

title: 📰 Pakistan Lifts 7-Year Crypto Banking Ban for Licensed Firms
message: Pakistan's central bank ended its blanket prohibition on crypto banking, allowing licensed virtual asset providers to open bank accounts for the first time since 2018.

title: 📰 Japan Reclassifies Crypto as Financial Instruments in Historic Shift
message: Japan's cabinet approved legislation putting crypto in the same legal category as stocks and bonds, with insider trading bans and a proposed flat 20% capital gains tax.

title: 📰 Next Fed Chair Warsh Discloses Crypto Portfolio Spanning 20+ Firms
message: Fed Chair nominee Kevin Warsh's ethics filing reveals holdings in Solana, Polymarket, Optimism, dYdX, and over 20 blockchain-linked entities he must divest before confirmation.

title: 📰 DoubleZero Edge Goes Live, Bringing Wall Street Speed to Solana
message: DoubleZero launched its Edge platform today, delivering real-time Solana block data over a dedicated fiber network to give traders a milliseconds-level speed advantage.

title: 📰 Tether Backs Drift Relaunch With $148M After $286M Exploit
message: Tether and partners are injecting up to $148 million into Drift Protocol to cover user losses and relaunch the Solana DEX with USDT as its core settlement layer.

title: 📰 Goldman Sachs Files First-Ever Bitcoin ETF With Yield Play
message: Goldman Sachs asked the SEC to approve a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF that holds spot BTC funds and sells covered calls to generate monthly yield.

title: 📰 Goldman Sachs Files First Bitcoin ETF With Covered-Call Yield Play
message: Goldman Sachs asked the SEC to approve a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF that holds spot BTC funds and sells covered calls on up to 100% of exposure for monthly yield.

title: 📰 Bitcoin Rally Stalls Near $75K as $1.14B in Profits Hit Exchanges
message: Bitcoin is cooling at $74.8K after tagging $76K this week as CryptoQuant flags the biggest spike in whale deposits and realized profits since late 2025.

title: 📰 SEC Crypto Task Force Roundtable Gavels In as CLARITY Clock Ticks
message: SEC commissioners, industry execs and Hill staff are now live at the Crypto Task Force's market-structure roundtable — the last public read on regulator posture before a Senate Banking CLARITY markup targeted for late April.

title: 📰 Ether Outpaces Bitcoin as ETF Flows Split and Activity Jumps 41%
message: Spot ETH ETFs pulled $187M last week — the strongest showing of 2026 — while US spot BTC ETFs bled $325M on April 13 alone, flipping the capital rotation story.

title: 📰 Tether Ships Self-Custodial 'People's Wallet' for 570M Users
message: Tether launched tether.wallet this week, a self-custodial app for USDT, USAT, XAUT and BTC with gas paid in the asset being sent and human-readable addresses.

title: 📰 SEC CLARITY Roundtable Convenes Today as Senate Clock Ticks
message: The SEC's Crypto Task Force gavels in its long-scheduled market-structure roundtable Thursday — the last big public tell before a Senate Banking CLARITY Act markup tentatively slated for late April.

title: 📰 Crypto Rips 5-9% as US-Iran Peace Talks Restart
message: Bitcoin reclaimed $74,900 and ether jumped 5.6% to $2,345 overnight as Washington brokered fresh Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks, thawing the geopolitical risk that had pinned crypto for two weeks.

title: 📰 Circle CEO Refuses to Freeze $232M in USDC From Drift Hack
message: Jeremy Allaire publicly defended Circle's decision not to blacklist USDC wallets tied to the $285M Drift exploit, saying the issuer will only act with a court order.

title: 📰 Saylor Scoops Another 13,927 BTC, Strategy Stack Hits 780,897
message: Michael Saylor's Strategy bought 13,927 BTC for roughly $1 billion last week, lifting its treasury to 780,897 coins — about 3.8% of all Bitcoin that will ever exist.

title: 📰 SEC Market Structure Roundtable Begins Today as CLARITY Clock Ticks
message: The SEC kicks off its digital asset market structure roundtable Thursday, the last big tell on where regulators land before the Senate Banking CLARITY markup in late April.

title: 📰 Fed Chair Nominee Warsh Discloses Crypto Portfolio Spanning DeFi
message: Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve, Kevin Warsh, disclosed indirect stakes in Solana, Polymarket, dYdX, Compound, Optimism, and over a dozen other crypto projects.

title: 📰 CLARITY Act Pulled From Senate Calendar, April 25 Deadline Looms
message: The U.S. Senate quietly removed the CLARITY market-structure bill from its schedule, leaving crypto's biggest legislative priority on the brink of dying before midterms.
